# TS9800

**Category:** Operators · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Operator '{operator}' cannot be overloaded with @operator
```

## Explanation

Certain operators have fixed semantics and cannot be overloaded:
- Assignment operators (=, +=, etc.)
- Logical operators (&&, ||)
- Comma operator (,)

Use method calls or alternative patterns for these operations.

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
